About.metaDescription: Mandate practice: organizational transformation in the AI era—role definition, leadership search.
About.title: About
About.lede: Xten works where the work to be done often precedes the title: emerging mandates, political tension, execution under constraint.
About.body1: We combine leader search and mandate clarification—when the organization knows it must change but not yet under what operating role.
About.body2: Internal methods, quiet, tested in hard situations—without publishing a catalog here.
About.body3: Deliberately limited volume. Confidentiality as structure.
